haiku:
Sugar swirls in sun,
Colors twirl with joyful taste,
Lollipops bring smiles.
Happy #NationalLollipopDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Silver moon above,
Whispers of the night breeze sing,
Stars twinkle like dreams.
Happy #MoonDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Joyful tales unwind,
Crisp pages turn like soft winds,
Laughter warms the room.
#HappyBirthdayCormacMcCarthy from @ClamBakeSanta
